mailingAddress.street: Bluth Frozen Banana Stand, Balboa Pier

roles.name: CEO of the Bluth Company
roles.description: There's always money in the banana stand — designs the over-arching solution and keeps the family business afloat.

roles.name: Project Lead (Reluctant Michael)
roles.description: The only sane one — marshals scope, timeline, and the chaos of relatives on payroll.

roles.name: Stair Car Operator
roles.description: Hop on, hop off — keeps fields, layouts, permission sets and the stair car running daily.

roles.name: Magician's Apprentice (Builder)
roles.description: Forges Apex, LWC, and the occasional illusion — never call it a trick.

roles.name: Bluth Family Attorney (US Lead)
roles.description: Captain over all US Salesforce craft — sets standards à la Barry Zuckerkorn (he's very good).

roles.name: Senior Sudden Valley Consultant
roles.description: Patrols the borders of customer requirements with the seasoned grace of a model home walkthrough.

roles.name: Sudden Valley Site Consultant
roles.description: Carries discovery and configuration across the realm — preferably without crossing into the model home.

roles.name: Frozen Banana Integration Architect
roles.description: Architect of the great spans between Salesforce and the realms beyond — there's always an API in the banana stand.

roles.name: Senior Banana Bag Engineer
roles.description: Lays the stones of API, middleware and event flows — bag the bananas, not the budget.

roles.name: Banana Bag Apprentice
roles.description: Learns the craft of integration — webhooks, batch, callouts and the occasional dropped chocolate dipper.

roles.name: Hot Cops Quality Inspector
roles.description: Tends the wounded build — finds maladies before they reach production. Steve Holt!

roles.name: Bluth Marketing Czar
roles.description: Lifts the banner for product and message — leads all marketing craft. (Mr. F, optional.)

roles.name: Senior Pitchperson
roles.description: Strategist of campaigns — sounds the call to gather and convert. Like a magician, but with leads.

roles.name: Pitchperson
roles.description: Carries the campaign forward — content, creative and the daily dance moves.

roles.name: Bluth Family Analyst
roles.description: Records what is needed and what is promised — translates between the family's chaos and the dev team's clean slate.

roles.name: US Senior Magician-Builder
roles.description: Senior US-side builder — Apex, LWC, escalations. Don't call them an illusionist.

roles.name: Junior Sudden Valley Consultant
roles.description: First-year talent — clicks before code, learns the ropes on the Bluth model home tour.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every realm starts at least one month in the past — past weeks get Time Entries (Step 6), future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2-3 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set.

realms.projectName: Bluth Family Core — Banana Stand CRM Rollout
Bluth Co. Staff — Operational Sales Platform
Legal & Medical Orbit — Compliance Platform Build

bluth-family-core.name: Family Meeting Kickoff
bluth-family-core.description: Discovery sign-off — kitchen table convened, no jokes about Lucille's drinking.

bluth-family-core.name: Cash in the Banana Stand
bluth-family-core.description: Build kickoff — there's always money in the banana stand. Always.

bluth-family-core.name: Audit by the SEC
bluth-family-core.description: Mid-project gate — government inspectors review the books.

bluth-family-core.name: GOB's Illusion Demo
bluth-family-core.description: Phase invoice trigger — never call it a trick. Featuring The Final Countdown.

bluth-family-core.name: Penthouse Go-Live
bluth-family-core.description: Go-Live — the family business returns to the penthouse.

bluth-family-core.name: Michael's Hand-off to Buster
bluth-family-core.description: Hyper-care close — stewardship passed (regrettably) to Buster.

bluth-co-staff.name: All-Hands at the C-Wing
bluth-co-staff.description: Project kickoff — entire staff convened, including Lupe and Carl Weathers.

bluth-co-staff.name: Stew Day with Carl Weathers
bluth-co-staff.description: Build phase — baby, you've got a stew going. Lunch & learn.

bluth-co-staff.name: Sitwell Counter-Bid Defended
bluth-co-staff.description: UAT gate — Sitwell Enterprises competitive review survived.

bluth-co-staff.name: Steve Holt! Goes Live
bluth-co-staff.description: Go-Live — Steve Holt charges through the door. STEVE HOLT!

bluth-co-staff.name: Office Park Hyper-care
bluth-co-staff.description: Hyper-care close — Larry Middleman provides remote support.

bluth-co-staff.name: Final Bluth Co. Invoice
bluth-co-staff.description: Final invoice — Lupe approves, Lucille signs reluctantly.

legal-medical-orbit.name: Zuckerkorn Engagement
legal-medical-orbit.description: Discovery — He's very good. Retainer signed, court date set.

legal-medical-orbit.name: Forge the Bob Loblaw Law Blog
legal-medical-orbit.description: Build — content layer deployed, defamation risk reviewed.

legal-medical-orbit.name: Wayne Jarvis Compliance Audit
legal-medical-orbit.description: Solution review — strict, sober, and on schedule.

legal-medical-orbit.name: Tobias Diagnosis Module Live
legal-medical-orbit.description: Go-Live — analrapist platform fully operational. (He's both.)

legal-medical-orbit.name: Discovery Closed
legal-medical-orbit.description: Project close — depositions archived, files sealed.

legal-medical-orbit.name: Final Legal Reckoning
legal-medical-orbit.description: Final invoice — billable hours from the orbit settled.

extended-cast.name: Narrator's Opening Voiceover
extended-cast.description: Kickoff — Now the story of a wealthy family who lost everything…

extended-cast.name: Marky Bark Field Trip
extended-cast.description: Discovery — ostrich farm site survey complete.

extended-cast.name: Cornballer Recall Resolved
extended-cast.description: Build — recurring product hazard finally patched.

extended-cast.name: On-the-Next-Episode Preview
extended-cast.description: UAT acceptance — preview reel approved by stakeholders.

extended-cast.name: Series Finale Go-Live
extended-cast.description: Go-Live + handoff — and that's why you don't ship on Friday.

extended-cast.name: Final Narrator Invoice
extended-cast.description: Final invoice — Ron Howard signs off.

George Sr. Bluth.notes: In the attic. Or Mexico. Or the model home wall.

Lucille Bluth.notes: Cocktails at the Balboa Club — required attendance.

Buster Bluth.notes: Hand reattachment follow-up — loose seal incident.

George-Michael Bluth.notes: FaceBook (the sequel) demo day at school.

Maeby Fünke.notes: Studio exec day job — no one suspects a thing.

Carl Weathers.notes: Stew simmering — baby, you've got a stew going.

Bob Loblaw.notes: Bob Loblaw Law Blog content sprint.

Ron Howard.notes: Directing — narrator booth closed for the week.
